channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Leaking pipe, 8th March
item.description:
Leaking pipe on road outside 4 Ambrose Avenue
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ambrose Avenue, Temple Fortune, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dirty pillow and blanket dumped outside house, 8th March
item.description:
Someone dumped a large dirty pillow and blanket outside house on street
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Church Manorway, Abbey Wood

item.title: Someone’s placed all bin bags on street, 8th March
item.description:
Bags have split

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tyler Street, Greenwich

item.title: Two potholes, 8th March
item.description:
Two potholes that are on the north side of the median immediately to the east of the junction of Falloden Way and Midholm

item.title: Many appliances refrigerators, stoves, microwaves, freezers, 8th March
item.description:
It's been several months and I started to find rats in my garden
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Upnor Way, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole Essex Road/Britannia Row, 8th March
item.description:
Large pothole near kerb on Essex Rd j/w Britannia Row (in the southbound bus lane) needs attending to urgently please. Causing houses to shake
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Essex Road, Islington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very large pot hole, 8th March
item.description:
On the crossroads junction outside Pope street/library Will cause an accident as cars going straight over onto avery hill road swerve to avoid the pothole the cars turning right at Pope street have to swerve
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Footscray Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes, 8th March
item.description:
Big potholes
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): King William Walk, Greenwich

item.title: Very large pothole, 8th March
item.description:
There are a few pot holes on Goffers road but this one is extremely large
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Goffers Road, Blackheath, Greater London

item.title: Graffiti on yellow bin, 8th March
item.description:
Just noticed this on the perfectly fine yellow bin today.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Abbey Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Fly Tipping - Industrial Waste, 8th March
item.description:
Corner of layby, to RHS of right lane. Industrial waste, oil drums, etc fly tipped. There was a van suspiciously stopped in this exact location a day before the fly tipping occurred - possibly 27th Feb or 3rd March at approx 4pm - please check CCTV.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): M11, Woodford Bridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car been left for 2 years, 8th March
item.description:
Car been left for 2 years not moved Gold Vauxhall zafira parked out side the flats
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cumbrian Avenue, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wet leaves on pathway. Causing a slippery surfce, 8th March
item.description:
You've got pics and location

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tawney Road, Thamesmead

item.title: Fly tiping, 8th March
item.description:

item.title: Bin bag mess left near bins by Greenwood theatre, 8th March
item.description:
Torn bin bags left by Greenwood Theatre leaving scattered rubbish in the surrounding area. Noticed since yesterday.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18–20, Newcomen Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bad road surface, 8th March
item.description:
Plough Way SE16. The road surface all along this section is in a very poor condition. Needs resurfacing. Thank You.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 93, Plough Way, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
